author: mark
text:
show: render external remote_key/remote_url

Plugins populate task.external.<plugin>.{remote_key,remote_url} on push,
but bl show's human view omitted it — agents had to dig through --json to
find a Jira key or issue URL. Add a 'remote:' block that surfaces those
two conventional fields, mirroring the style of the existing 'links:'
block. Plugins whose blob has neither field are skipped to keep the view
focused on remote pointers rather than arbitrary plugin internals.
